title: 推荐课程关联规则分析（Apriori）
subtitle: 用户学习/购买的课程组合 → 关联规则
businessGoal: 给学生做“学过这门课还会学什么”

chapters.title: 课程组合数据
chapters.content: 每行形如 '课程1,课程3,课程7'，代表一个用户学习的课程集合。

codeExamples.title: 切分
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-course-bundles.csv')
df['course_list'] = df['courses'].str.split(',')
print(df['course_list'].head())
all_c = sorted({c for s in df['course_list'] for c in s})
print('全部课程:', all_c)

selfCheckQuestions.question: 把逗号字符串切分为列表用？

chapters.title: 频繁项集
chapters.content: 不依赖 mlxtend，手写简化版 Apriori。support = 共同出现次数 / 总用户数。

codeExamples.title: 单项/两项支持度
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; from itertools import combinations; from collections import Counter
df = pd.read_csv('sample-course-bundles.csv')
sets = [set(s.split(',')) for s in df['courses']]
N = len(sets)
c1 = Counter()
for s in sets:
    for c in s: c1[frozenset({c})] += 1
print('Top 单项:')
for item, c in c1.most_common(8):
    print(list(item), f'{c/N:.2%}')
c2 = Counter()
for s in sets:
    if len(s) >= 2:
        for a, b in combinations(sorted(s), 2): c2[frozenset({a, b})] += 1
print('\nTop 两项组合:')
for item, c in c2.most_common(8):
    print(list(item), f'{c/N:.2%}')

selfCheckQuestions.question: support 是组合出现的样本比例。
生成长度为 2 的无序不重复组合用 itertools.____

chapters.title: 关联规则与推荐
chapters.content: conf(A→B) = support(A,B)/support(A)，据此给出 “学过 A 推荐 B” 的规则。

codeExamples.title: 推荐
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; from itertools import combinations; from collections import Counter
df = pd.read_csv('sample-course-bundles.csv')
sets = [set(s.split(',')) for s in df['courses']]
c1 = Counter(); c2 = Counter()
for s in sets:
    for c in s: c1[frozenset({c})] += 1
    if len(s) >= 2:
        for a, b in combinations(sorted(s), 2): c2[frozenset({a, b})] += 1
rules = []
for p, cnt in c2.items():
    a, b = sorted(p)
    rules += [(f'{a} -> {b}', cnt / c1[frozenset({a})], cnt/len(sets))]
rules.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
for r in rules[:10]:
    print(r[0], f'conf={r[1]:.2%}, supp={r[2]:.2%}')

selfCheckQuestions.question: 高置信度 A→B 说明？
options: 学过 A 的人很可能也学 B

exercises.prompt: 输出被学习次数最多的前 5 门课程。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; from collections import Counter
df = pd.read_csv('sample-course-bundles.csv')
hints: flat = [c for s in df['courses'] for c in s.split(',')]
exercises.sampleAnswer:
flat = [c for s in df['courses'] for c in s.split(',')]
print(Counter(flat).most_common(5))

finalExam.question: “学过这门课还会学什么”对应？
都是热门课的高共现规则推荐价值有限。
Apriori 工程化的常见步骤？
枚举无序不重复的组合用 itertools.____
